Name: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' that appears before 'Completed + In Call' in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Number of cases where 'Unmatched + Unmatched' is immediately followed by 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' relative to the total occurrences of 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Frequency of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' in variants that do not include 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all cases where 'Completed + In Call' does not happen

Name: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' among all non-terminal activities in the log
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all cases

Name: Number of variants in which 'Unmatched + Unmatched' occurs without any subsequent 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' does not occur

Name: Ratio of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' occurrences to 'Completed + Resolved' occurrences
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Percentage of cases containing 'Unmatched + Unmatched' that eventually reach 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average number of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' events per case across all variants
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Unmatched + Unmatched'

Name: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' executed by resources who also perform 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' in high-impact incidents (impact = 'High') compared to its overall frequency
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all cases
